---
title: "Reunion with Yi Zhang at CMU"
description: "A pleasant surprise — running into my old LTI host from twenty years ago."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-05-17"
categories: [CMU, personal, photo]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Yi Zhang at CMU.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

And a *very* pleasant surprise to run into my host @ LTI, Yi Zhang, when I first arrived at CMU almost 20 years ago!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_and-a-very-pleasant-surprise-to-run-into-activity-6534981349240111104-6j46).*
